name: 矩阵（HL）
subject: math
domain_name: 数与代数 / Number & Algebra / Number & Algebra
curriculum_points: Perform operations with matrices, including addition, scalar multiplication, and matrix multiplication, and calculate determinants and inverses of 2x2 and 3x3 matrices (AO1).
Use matrices to represent and solve systems of linear equations, and apply them to transformations in two and three dimensions.

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「矩阵（HL）」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：Use matrices to represent and solve systems of linear equations, and apply them … 对理解「矩阵（HL）」为何重要？
